title: facial hair
transcript:
[00:00:00.00] Are you looking at my facial hair?
[00:00:07.00] Is there something?
[00:00:12.00] Something like James Earl Jones?
[00:00:16.00] Every time I go to the airport.
[00:00:19.00] James Earl Jones, the airport.
[00:00:24.00] Just saying, hey, you got something hidden up in that?
[00:00:27.00] I can see how you could have something hidden up that most dashy old.
[00:00:34.00] Every time I got to say, are you looking at my facial hair?
[00:00:44.00] I got to ask so I can get the real answer.
[00:00:50.00] Because I know it was standing in my eyebrows.
[00:00:54.00] So I'm saying, are you looking at my facial hair?
